title: LoginSecurityByProYoutuber_34
description: A very good developer plugin That has the following features in the discreption
body:
#  Security Plugin

## Features

# /register <password>
Register your account

# /login <password>
Login to your account

# /changepassword <old> <new>
Change your password

# /sosban <name>
Ban a player's IP permanently (OP only)

# /emergency
Ban all player IPs permanently (OP only)

# /emergency stop
Stop emergency mode (OP only)
